title: All White Everything
description: This makies the game completely white, all blocks entity's and items!
body:
Hello, I am the original creator of this pack.

All blocks and items are white with a chicken logo on them, and all the names of items, and bloks are replaced by “unknown” for added difficulty.

Biome tinting has been fully removed (grass, leaves, vines, jungle foliage, etc.), keeping everything looking the same across all biomes!

Works in most versions, and works without any mods. HAve fun!!!
